subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath perceived the fragrance of the garment and hath turned towards the Countenance when the horizon of the world was illumined by this Most Great Light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن وجد عرف القمیص و توجه الی الوجه اذ انار افق العالم بهذا النیر الاعظم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
